code: import{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{GetSeasons}from"../services/season-service";import SeasonCard from"../atoms/card/season-card";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Home=()=>{const navigate=useNavigate();const[seasons,setData]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{GetSeasons().then(seasons=>setData(seasons));},[]);const handleClick=seasonId=>navigate('/Season/'+seasonId);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(_Fragment,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"container-fluid",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"row",children:seasons?seasons.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(SeasonCard,{season:item,handleClick:handleClick,children:" "},item.id)):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Loading Seasons..."})})})});};export default Home;
